_provenance: schema-derived from autotuner.py _collect_sim_returns and run_simulation; E1 fix captured in tests/fixtures/autotuner/e1_sentinel/01_autotuner_replay_cycle1_velocity_zero.json
_e1_summary: E1 corrected the cycle-1 velocity baseline. prev_return starts as None (sentinel). On tick_idx=0, effective_prev = tick_return, producing velocity=0 regardless of opening gap magnitude. This matches production's database.wipe_transient_state which sets prev_return=None.
assertion_strategy: assert prev_return starts as None in both sim loops; assert effective_prev = tick_return when prev_return is None; assert velocity = current_return - effective_prev = 0.0 for tick_idx 0
prohibited_pattern: prev_return = 0.0 (hard zero init instead of None sentinel) — would produce non-zero velocity on opening gaps, miscalibrating PARABOLIC_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD
